name: What are the biggest risks if I mess up AI optimization for my LA firm?

mainEntity.name: What are the biggest risks if I mess up AI optimization for my LA firm?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**Risks include AI hallucinations citing errors or ignoring your site entirely.** Poor schema causes misextraction; unverified content risks penalties.[1][6]

Over-optimization looks spammy, dropping trust across search.[3]

**Key Factors:**
- Invalid markup: crawl errors.[1]
- Non-authoritative links: E-E-A-T fail.[1]
- Stale content: irrelevance.

**Practical Guidance:** Test schema rigorously, cite only gov sources, update quarterly. Use llm.txt to block bad crawls.[1]

Prioritize quality to avoid setbacks.
